label: VK — Russian Social Network
description: VK (VKontakte) — the largest Russian social network. News feed, messages, groups, music, videos, wiki pages. Russian locale default. Heavy JS SPA. Login via phone/email + password + SMS 2FA possible. Used for social media posting, community management, advertising.
source_patterns: News feed scroll (infinite): 300-600px per pass, 2-5s between (content consumption)
Like/repost/comment: hover 1-2s → click, share menu on repost
Messages UI: click chat → 1-3s load → type reply → Enter/Send
Group management: post creation via composer, moderation tools in sidebar
Photo/video upload: click attach → file dialog → wait 2-10s for processing
Music player: click track → 2-5s buffer → plays embedded
Ads management (vk.com/ads): tabbed interface, campaign CRUD
Login flow: type identifier (800-2000ms) → password → possible SMS 2FA code input

active_hours.description: Russian timezone — morning, lunch, evening peaks

scroll.description: Feed-style infinite scroll — mixed text/image/video content. Source: VK UI patterns

mouse.description: Moderate speed — deliberate on forms, quicker on feed interactions

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate feed → scroll 4-6 passes → pause on interesting post → expand comments → like | repost → scroll more → optionally open messages → reply
